name: OmopPatientObservationPeriodView
title: Patient → observation_period (flat)
description: Observation period defines spans during which a person is observable. Not a direct field-level mapping from Patient — derived from event data availability. Most implementations either skip this table or emit a placeholder row at person-creation time.

column.name: person_id
column.description: Foreign key to person table, derived from Patient.id

where.description: Derived per-person from data availability, not directly from Patient fields
